summary: Iteration 59: CEO Operating System Multi-Dashboard Testing - All 8 dashboard sections tested successfully. Fixed missing 'Cell' import in GrowthDashboard.js. 42/42 backend tests pass. All UI tests pass.

issues: Minor hydration warning about span/tr nesting - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data

Sales dashboard includes Kanban (7 columns) + Table view + Performance sub-tab. Lead side panel works with status/payment updates. Risk dashboard has working SVG gauge. One bug fixed: Added missing 'Cell' import to GrowthDashboard.js recharts imports.
